popup_multiselect_patrolzones_descriptio:
Multi-Select to define priority attractions and facilities to be assigned to staff members.

Mechanics will only interact with the selected rides if assigned to this.
Vendors will only try to work in the selected shops if assigned to this.
All staff members will prefer to use selected staff buildings but will look elsewhere if they are full.
All staff will use everything selected as places to patrol to while walking.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyflatrid: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} flat rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyprops_v: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} scenery pieces at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyrides_v: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} rides at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanytracked: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} coasters, tracked rides, or flumes at a time.
popup_multiselect_recolourtoomanyvolumes: Cannot change colours for more than {VALUE:int} path/pool sections at a time.
popup_multiselect_toomanybuildings: Cannot Duplicate more than one building at a time.
popup_ride_carspertrainhint: Cannot edit trains or cars while ride is Open
popup_ride_carspertrainlimit: Increase the length of all stations to allow more cars to be added.
popup_ride_coasterfriction_hint: Apply a multiplier to the default friction for this coaster.
popup_ride_disabledwhileopentooltip: Cannot edit trains, cars, laps, or operation mode while ride is Open
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_chainstatus_: No coasters or tracked rides in this Coaster Chain are able to be opened.
Set all coasters and tracked rides in the chain to the Closed state.
Set all coasters and tracked rides in the chain to the Open state, if they can be opened.
Set all coasters and tracked rides in the chain to the Testing state, if they can be tested.
Setting the Chain Status will put all coasters and tracked rides in the chain into the same ride state, if possible.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_coaster_loca: Locate this coaster or tracked ride in the world.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_coaster_remo: Delete this coaster or tracked ride from the chain.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_description: Create a Coaster Chain to make Coasters and Tracked Rides start at the same time, provided their Load Rules have been met.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_rideclosed: Closed or broken down coasters and tracked rides will be ignored.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_rideopen: Open coasters and tracked rides all depart at the same time.
popup_ride_duellingcoasters_ridetesting: Testing coasters and tracked rides all depart at the same time.
popup_ride_enablefastpassaccessible: Cannot enable until ride is accessible.
popup_ride_enablefastpasshint: Build a special section of the queue exclusive to Priority Pass holders. You need a Guest Services to sell Priority Passes
popup_ride_enablefastpasslabel: You need a Guest Services to sell Priority Passes
popup_ride_fastpassfractionhint:
How quickly Priority Pass holders rejoin the main queue
- Affects the value of Priority Passes
popup_ride_lapshint: Cannot edit number of laps while ride is Open
popup_ride_lapshint_desc: The number of times a train can go through the station before stopping.
popup_ride_leaveifwaitinghint:
Arriving trains will override the min. rider load, as well as the min. and max. waiting times
- Can increase monthly guests
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_loadfractiontooltip:
How full must each train be before it can depart
- Overriden by max. waiting time
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_loadfractiontooltiprides:
How full must the ride be before it can start
- Overriden by max. waiting time
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_maxwaitingtimehint:
The longest time each train will wait to achieve the min. rider load
- Can increase monthly guests
- Overriden when the ride is fully loaded
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_maxwaitingtimeridehint:
The longest time the ride will wait to achieve the min. rider load
- Can increase monthly guests
- Overriden when the ride is fully loaded
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_minwaitingtimehint:
Each train will depart after this time if the min. rider load has been achieved
- Can reduce queue times and space out trains
- Overriden when the ride is fully loaded
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_minwaitingtimeridehint:
The ride will start after this time if the min. rider load has been achieved
- Can reduce queue times
- Overriden when the ride is fully loaded
- Min. departure interval must also have elapsed
popup_ride_numtrainslimit: To add more trains try increasing the length of the station, or reducing the number of cars per train.
popup_ride_numtrainslimit_blocksection: To add more trains try adding additional block sections.
popup_ride_passeshint: Cannot edit number of passes through station while ride is Open
popup_ride_passeshint_desc: The number of times a train can pass through the station before stopping.
popup_ride_powered_speed_off: This ride needs to be closed to have its train speed changed.
popup_ride_poweredbehaviourtooltip: With this on, powered rides use power to reduce deceleration and maintain exciting momentum.
popup_ride_queuescenery:
Queue Scenery Rating

This factor contributes to the ride's Prestige.
The prettier your queues look, the more they are valued by guests.
popup_ride_queuetime:
Queue Time

Ride ticket price affects how long guests are willing to queue.

Lower ride ticket prices result in longer queues.
popup_ride_statictrainnum:
{Value}: {num:int}
Altering the speed and length of this ride will change the number of groups.
popup_ride_timebetweendepartureshint:
The time that must elapse before the train can depart
- Useful for spacing out cars
- Applies even when the ride is fully loaded
popup_ride_trackedrideoperationmode_bloc: Multiple Trains can be used and will stop at block section pieces. The number of trains available is dependent on the number of block section pieces.
popup_ride_trackedrideoperationmode_boom: A Single Train travels forwards and backwards through the station multiple times.
popup_ride_trackedrideoperationmode_lapp: A Single Train may travel through the station for multiple laps.
popup_ride_trackedrideoperationmode_shut: A Single Train exits from the front of the station and is then launched backwards. This mode is automatically activated when using the Shuttle Launch Booster straight after a station.
A Single Train travels forwards and backwards through the stations.

popup_ride_transport_stationopenclosehin: Ride must be open before station can be opened or closed
popup_ride_transportridefinancehint: Prices are set on a per station basis
